entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: A valuable natural resource essential for food, feed, and fiber production

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A valuable natural resource essential for food, feed, and fiber production

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of protecting soil and water resources to optimize productivity and improve livelihoods

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop output, which can be low and variable under rainfed conditions

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life for people in rainfed areas

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Regions where agriculture depends on rainfall and is prone to moisture stress

entities.name: SOIL SURFACE LAYER
entities.description: The top layer of soil that contains most nutrients and organic matter

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential elements found in the soil surface layer that contribute to fertility

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: Decomposed organic material found in the soil surface layer

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth, which is reduced by the loss of the soil surface layer

entities.name: RUNOFF WATER
entities.description: Water that flows over the land surface, contributing to moisture stress

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A state of water deficiency in crops, leading to low and variable productivity

entities.name: HUMAN BEINGS
entities.description: The population whose basic needs for food, feed, and fiber are met by natural resources
